'''Sssiii''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Slith]] of [[red]] [[Color/Legends|coloration]], weighing 60 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]]. He was somehow obtained by the [[Galactic Circus]] and toured with them on a number of [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], including [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Sssiii had only limited intelligence, corresponding to that of a 10-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old [[Human/Legends|Human]], and was unable to speak to its companions; Sssiii communicated instead by striking the ground with his tail. During circus performances, Sssiii provided entertainment by playing [[Chess/Legends|chess]] against the spectators.<ref name="Le facteur X" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sssiii appears as a non-player character in the roleplaying adventure ''Le facteur X'', published in [[Casus Belli (magazine)|''Casus Belli'']]. This is a French gaming magazine and it is unknown whether the article went through licensing; therefore Sssiii's [[canon]]icity is ambiguous.<ref name="Le facteur X" />
